subject: [HELM] Uses new tpls for repos / images
commit_message:
[HELM] Uses new tpls for repos / images

This commit makes Helm example chart to use the new generator for repositories
and images.

Issue-ID: OOM-2364
Signed-off-by: Sylvain Desbureaux <sylvain.desbureaux@orange.com>
Change-Id: I1561fa6626687cf841c278231f2caab9cd99d46b

entries.message:
Patch Set 1:

Gitlab controller: Deployment put on queue, number 14 on the queue.

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-verify-helm/6626/ : FAILURE
